title: cerastium arvense subsp. stenopetalum
intro: Cerastium arvense subsp. stenopetalum, also known as corn buttercup or Stenopetalum, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Caryophyllaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, and has been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Cerastium arvense subsp. stenopetalum include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and supporting digestive health. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, making it accessible for use in herbal remedies.
